title: T-070 — costing_breakdowns + costing_waterfall_steps tables (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-070 — Costing schema

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create costing tables for the Costing stage screen: costing_breakdowns (per-FA per-scenario row with raw cost / margin / target price), costing_waterfall_steps (9 steps per breakdown — Raw materials → Yield loss → Process labour → Packaging → Overhead → Logistics → Margin → Distributor → Retail).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration packages/db/migrations/0070_costing.sql creates costing_breakdowns (id PK, tenant_id, product_code FK fa, scenario TEXT (target/pessimistic/optimistic + custom), raw_cost_eur, margin_pct, target_price_eur, computed_at, UNIQUE(tenant_id, product_code, scenario)) + costing_waterfall_steps (id PK, breakdown_id FK ON DELETE CASCADE, step_index INT 1..9, step_name, value_eur, delta_pct).
2. CHECK on step_index BETWEEN 1 AND 9; CHECK margin_pct >= -100.
3. RLS + indexes (tenant_id, product_code).
4. Drizzle schemas + barrel.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0070_costing.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/costing.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/costing.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0070 runs, when \d costing_breakdowns runs, then it lists scenario + UNIQUE(tenant_id, product_code, scenario) per §17.11.3 scenario uniqueness
2. Given a costing_breakdowns row is deleted, when DELETE runs, then matching costing_waterfall_steps rows are CASCADE-deleted per ON DELETE CASCADE
3. Given an INSERT with step_index=10 is attempted into costing_waterfall_steps, when it runs, then it fails CHECK (step_index BETWEEN 1 AND 9) per §17.11.3 9-step waterfall

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/costing.test.ts asserting UNIQUE + CHECK + cascade + RLS before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test costing'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow step_index outside 1..9
- Do not omit ON DELETE CASCADE on waterfall_steps
- Do not skip RLS

pipeline_inputs.description: Create costing_breakdowns + costing_waterfall_steps tables with scenario UNIQUE + step CHECK + cascade.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration emits both tables. UNIQUE on (tenant, product, scenario). 9-step waterfall enforced via CHECK. RLS + cascade.
